rafan       2008-03-22 12:05:59 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net-mgmt             Makefile 
  Added files:
    net-mgmt/cowpatty    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
    net-mgmt/cowpatty/files patch-Makefile pkg-message.in 
  Log:
  coWPAtty is designed to audit the security of pre-shared keys
  (PSK) selected in WiFi Protected Access (WPA) networks.
  
  WWW: http://www.willhackforsushi.com/Cowpatty.html
  
  PR:             ports/121931
  Submitted by:   Dennis Herrmann <adox at mcx2.org>
